message:
test(cass): add format, filter, and extract function tests

ExtractSessionName (7 cases), extractCodeSnippets (5 cases),
sortScoredHits, formatMarkdown, formatMinimal, formatStructured,
FilterResults empty case. Coverage: 27.7% -> 43.8% (+16.1 pp)
